user.title: HA Alerts
user.description: Set up a new HA Alert. You will be able to configure repeat intervals, notification services, and message templates in the following steps.

data_description.name: A friendly name for this alert.
data_description.entity_id: The entity to watch for state changes.

data_description.state: The state that triggers the alert (e.g. 'on').
data_description.repeat: How often to repeat notifications (in minutes). Add multiple values for escalating intervals.
data_description.can_acknowledge: Allow the alert to be acknowledged (silenced) via the entity toggle.
data_description.skip_first: Skip the first notification and only alert after the first repeat interval.

data_description.notifiers: Select one or more notify services to send alerts through.
data_description.message: Optional Jinja2 template for the alert message. Defaults to the alert name.
data_description.done_message: Optional Jinja2 template for the message sent when the alert condition clears.
data_description.title: Optional Jinja2 template for the notification title.
data_description.data: Optional extra data payload to pass to the notification service.

error.repeat_error: Repeat intervals must be whole numbers (e.g. 5, 10, 30).

create.name: Create Alert
create.description: Create a new HA Alert programmatically.

name.name: Name
name.description: A friendly name for the new alert.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The entity to watch for state changes.

state.name: Alert State
state.description: The state that triggers the alert (e.g. 'on'). Defaults to 'on'.

repeat.name: Repeat Intervals
repeat.description: List of intervals in minutes between repeated notifications.

skip_first.name: Skip First Notification
skip_first.description: Skip the first notification and only alert after the first repeat interval.

can_acknowledge.name: Can Acknowledge
can_acknowledge.description: Allow the alert to be acknowledged (silenced) via the entity toggle.

notifiers.name: Notification Services
notifiers.description: List of notify service names to send alerts through.

message.name: Message Template
message.description: Optional Jinja2 template for the alert message. Defaults to the alert name.

done_message.name: Done Message Template
done_message.description: Optional Jinja2 template for the message sent when the alert condition clears.

title.name: Title Template
title.description: Optional Jinja2 template for the notification title.

data.name: Extra Data
data.description: Optional extra data payload to pass to the notification service.

update.name: Update Alert
update.description: Update the options of an existing HA Alert.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The entity_id of the alert to update.

state.name: Alert State
state.description: The state that triggers the alert (e.g. 'on').

repeat.name: Repeat Intervals
repeat.description: List of intervals in minutes between repeated notifications.

skip_first.name: Skip First Notification
skip_first.description: Skip the first notification and only alert after the first repeat interval.

can_acknowledge.name: Can Acknowledge
can_acknowledge.description: Allow the alert to be acknowledged (silenced) via the entity toggle.

notifiers.name: Notification Services
notifiers.description: List of notify service names to send alerts through.

message.name: Message Template
message.description: Optional Jinja2 template for the alert message.

done_message.name: Done Message Template
done_message.description: Optional Jinja2 template for the message sent when the alert condition clears.

title.name: Title Template
title.description: Optional Jinja2 template for the notification title.

data.name: Extra Data
data.description: Optional extra data payload to pass to the notification service.

delete.name: Delete Alert
delete.description: Delete an existing HA Alert by its entity_id.

entity_id.name: Entity
entity_id.description: The entity_id of the alert to delete.
